message:
🐛 Fix agent dropdown navbar shift by reordering settings button (#311)

Move the settings gear button to render before (left of) the agent
dropdown button so that when the AgentSelector conditionally appears
or disappears, the dropdown stays anchored to the right edge of the
navbar without shifting other elements.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -107,6 +107,15 @@ export function AgentSelector({ compact = false, className = '', showSettings =
   return (
     <>
     <div ref={dropdownRef} className={cn('relative flex items-center gap-1', className)}>
+      {showSettings && (
+        <button
+          onClick={() => setShowSettingsModal(true)}
+          className="p-1.5 hover:bg-secondary rounded-lg transition-colors text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+          title="API Key Settings"
+        >
+          <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
+        </button>
+      )}
       <button
         onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
         className={cn(
@@ -126,15 +135,6 @@ export function AgentSelector({ compact = false, className = '', showSettings =
           isOpen && 'rotate-180'
         )} />
       </button>
-      {showSettings && (
-        <button
-          onClick={() => setShowSettingsModal(true)}
-          className="p-1.5 hover:bg-secondary rounded-lg transition-colors text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
-          title="API Key Settings"
-        >
-          <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
-        </button>
-      )}
 
       {isOpen && (
         <div className="absolute z-50 top-full mt-1 right-0 w-64 rounded-lg bg-card border border-border shadow-lg py-1 overflow-hidden">
